reviews.review_msg: Great Professor who cares about her students. Tests were very fare (midterm harder than final) with final being pretty much just direct applications of the concepts we learned throughout the semester.
Likely the most intelligent professor I have had.  Is a virtual encyclopedia on everything relating to the course and is extremely passionate about his interests

There is a lot of reading you need to do for this course... and I mean a lot. The subject material is very interesting nonetheless but expect to be able to tie things together on your own. There was no textbook though so that was a plus! The assignment instructions are also very broad... which was troubling for my class. Tanya was a great TA!

Torsten is an awesome prof! He's super nice, understanding of student's stressful schedules & very knowledgeable about course material. He loves teaching, esp. Shakespeare, and it shows. Definitely take a class with him if you can! Best Eng. prof I've taken at SFU. Another awesome one: Steve Collis. Good Luck!!
